input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.8 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.8
            TITLE: tractive system part positioning

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.8: Tractive System Part Positioning
EV.4.8 Tractive System Part Positioning 
All parts belonging to the Tractive System must meet F.10.5.8

final_answer: rule EV.4.8: Tractive System Part Positioning EV.4.8 Tractive System Part Positioning All parts belonging to the Tractive System must meet F.10.5.8
